# UC-15.3.44 · PTZ Camera Preset Home and Auto-Flip Failure Monitoring

## Description

Pan-tilt-zoom cameras that fail to return to home preset after tours leave blind spots in perimeter coverage. Aggregating PTZ driver errors and preset timeouts highlights worn motors, icing, or serial control contention before guards notice wrong framing.

## Value

Maintains intended camera coverage for patrol routes and perimeter analytics by fixing mechanical PTZ faults early.

## Implementation

Enable verbose PTZ diagnostics only on problematic units to control volume. Map vendor codes to `error_code` lookup for human text. Alert when failures/hour exceed 5 for two consecutive hours. Correlate with weather API for outdoor domes.

## Detailed Implementation

Prerequisites
• Asset tag whether camera is PTZ vs fixed.
• Maintenance contract for mechanical service.

Step 1 — Capture baseline during calibration.

Step 2 — Suppress alerts during scheduled tours if errors expected.

Step 3 — Integrate with work order system.

Step 4 — Video clip bookmarking in VMS on alert.

## SPL

```spl
index=physical sourcetype=cctv:ptz OR (sourcetype=nvr:diagnostic PTZ)
| search preset OR Home OR timeout OR motor OR stall OR "PTZ error"
| stats count by host, camera_id, error_code
| where count > 5
| sort - count
```

## Visualization

Table (camera_id, error_code), Line chart (failures), Geo map for perimeter cams.
